name: NexGold Mining Corp.
description: NexGold Mining Corp. is a Canadian gold development company focused on advancing its 100%-owned Goliath Gold Complex in northwestern Ontario. The project consists of three distinct deposits—Goliath, Goldlund, and Miller—located within the Wabigoon Greenstone Belt. The company is dedicated to creating value through the responsible development of its flagship asset, which benefits from significant existing infrastructure and a clear path toward production. NexGold aims to become a mid-tier gold producer by leveraging its high-quality resource base and experienced management team in a premier mining jurisdiction.
